speaker: CRABBY
text: Alright buddy, we're here. Right where you paid me to bring you. Question is, why?

speaker: FINN
text: I'm looking for a car.

speaker: CRABBY
text: A car? Hey pal, you can't get any further away from land than out here.

speaker: FINN
text: Exactly where I want to be.

speaker: CRABBY
text: Well I got news for you, buddy. There's nobody out here but us.

speaker: COMBAT SHIP
text: What are you doing out here?

speaker: CRABBY
text: What does it look like, genius? I'm crabbing!

speaker: COMBAT SHIP
text: Well turn around and go back where you came from.

speaker: CRABBY
text: Yeah? And who's gonna make me?

speaker: CRABBY
text: Alright, alright! Don't get your prop in a twist. What a jerk. Sorry, buddy. Looks like it's the end of the line. Buddy?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Too many cars here. Out of my way!

speaker: FINN
text: Professor Zundapp? PACER Here it is, Professor.

speaker: NOSY PACER
text: You wanted to see this before we load it?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Ah, yes. Very carefully...

speaker: NOSY PACER
text: Oh. A TV camera. What does it actually do?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: This camera is extremely dangerous.

speaker: FINN
text: What are you up to now, Professor?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: This is valuable equipment. Make sure it is properly secured for the voyage.

speaker: NOSY PACER
text: You got it.

speaker: GREM
text: This is one of those British spies we told you about.

speaker: ACER
text: Yeah. This one we caught sticking his bumper where it didn't belong.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Agent Leland Turbo.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: It's Finn McMissile! He's seen the camera! Kill him!!

speaker: GREM
text: Get to the boats.

speaker: ACER
text: He's getting away!

speaker: COMBAT SHIP
text: Not for long.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Wunderbar. With Finn McMissile gone, who can stop us now?

speaker: MATER
text: Mater. Tow Mater, that's who... is here to help you!

speaker: MATER
text: Hey, Otis!

speaker: OTIS
text: Hey, Mater. Gosh, I'm so sorry. I thought I could make it this time, but... Smooth like pudding, huh? Ah, who am I kidding? I'll always be a lemon.

speaker: MATER
text: Well dadgum, you're leaking oil again. Must be your gaskets. Hey, look on the bright side: This is your tenth tow this month, so that means it's on the house.

speaker: OTIS
text: You're the only one that's nice to lemons like me, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: Don't sweat it. These things happen to everybody, Otis.

speaker: OTIS
text: But you never leak oil.

speaker: MATER
text: Yeah, but I ain't perfect. Don't tell nobody, but I think my rust is starting to show through.

speaker: OTIS
text: Hey, is Lightning McQueen back yet?

speaker: MATER
text: Not yet.

speaker: OTIS
text: He must be crazy-excited about winning his fourth Piston Cup. Four! Wow!

speaker: MATER
text: Yeah, we're so dadgum proud of him. But I sure wish he'd hurry up and get back `cause we got a whole summer's worth of best friend fun to make up for. Just me and --

speaker: MATER
text: --- McQueen!

speaker: OTIS
text: Uh, Mater? I'm in no hurry. You don't need to go so fast!

speaker: LUIGI
text: Oh, Lightning. Welcome home.

speaker: FLO
text: Good to have you back, honey.

speaker: FILLMORE
text: Congratulations, man.

speaker: SARGE
text: Welcome home, soldier.

speaker: SHERIFF
text: The place wasn't the same without you, son.

speaker: LIZZIE
text: What? Did he go somewhere?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: It's good to be home, everybody. MATER McQueen!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater!

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen!

speaker: OTIS
text: Woaahhhhh!

speaker: RAMONE
text: Hey. How far'd you make it this time, Otis?

speaker: OTIS
text: Halfway to the county line.

speaker: RAMONE
text: Not bad, man.

speaker: OTIS
text: I know, I can't believe it either!

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen, welcome back!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, it's so good to see you.

speaker: MATER
text: You too, buddy.

speaker: MATER
text: Oh, man. You ain't gonna believe the things I got planned for us.

speaker: MACK
text: These best friend greetings get longer every year.

speaker: MATER
text: You ready to have some serious fun?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Well, actually I've got something to show you first.

speaker: MATER
text: Wow. I can't believe they renamed the Piston Cup after our very own Doc Hudson.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I know Doc said these things were just old cups, but to have someone else win it just didn't feel right, you know?

speaker: MATER
text: Well, Doc would've been real proud of you. That's for sure.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Alright, pal. I've been waiting all summer for this. What've you got planned?

speaker: MATER
text: You sure you can handle it?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Come on, you know who you're talking to? This is Lightning McQueen. I can handle anything.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Uh.... Mater?!

speaker: MATER
text: Just remember, your brakes ain't gonna work on these!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Come on, come on! Faster, faster!

speaker: MATER
text: This is gonna be good!

speaker: MATER
text: Uh-oh. This ain't gonna be good.

speaker: MATER
text: Boy, this was the best day ever! And my favorite souvenir?

speaker: MATER
text: This new dent!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Boy, Mater. Today was, uh...

speaker: MATER
text: Shoot, that was nothing. Wait til you see what I got planned for tonight.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, Mater. Whoa. I was kind of thinking of just a quiet dinner.

speaker: MATER
text: That's exactly what I was thinking.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: No, I... I meant with Sally, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: Even better! You, me and Miss Sally going out for supper.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, I meant it would be just me and Sally.

speaker: MATER
text: Oh.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: It's just for tonight. We'll do whatever you want tomorrow.

speaker: MATER
text: Okay.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Thanks for understanding.

speaker: MATER
text: Yeah, sure. Y'all go on and have fun now.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Alright, then. See ya soon, amigo!

speaker: SALLY
text: This is so nice.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I can't tell you how good it is to be here alone. Just the two of us. Finally, you and me --- MATER Good evening.

speaker: MATER
text: My name is Mater and I'll be your waiter. Mater the waiter. That's funny right there.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, you work here?

speaker: MATER
text: Well yeah I work here. What'd you think, I just snuck in here when nobody was looking and pretended to be your waiter, just so I could hang out with you?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh, yeah. How ridiculous would that be?

speaker: MATER
text: Now, can I start you two lovebirds off with a couple drinks?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yes. I'll have my usual.

speaker: SALLY
text: You know what? I'm going to have that too.

speaker: MATER
text: Uh, right. Your usual.

speaker: MATER
text: Guido! What's McQueen's usual?

speaker: GUIDO
text: How should I know?

speaker: MATER
text: Perfect! Give me two of `em.

speaker: SARGE
text: Quiet! My program's on. MEL DORADO Tonight on "The Mel Dorado Show"!

speaker: MATER
text: What happened to the dinosaurs, now? MEL DORADO And on satellite, a World Grand Prix competitor and one of the fastest cars in the world, Francesco Bernoulli.

speaker: SARGE
text: Uh-oh... FRANCESCO If he is, how you say "the bestest race car," then why must he rest, eh? MATER'S VOICE Cause he knows what's important. Every now and then he prefers just to slow down, enjoy life. FRANCESCO Ah, you heard it! Lightning McQueen prefers to be slow! Of course, this is not news to Francesco. When I want to go to sleep I watch one of his races. After two laps I am out cold.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Hey, what's going on over there?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh, it's that Italian Formula car. His name is ---

speaker: SALLY
text: Francesco Bernoulli. No wonder there's a crowd.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Wait, why do you know his name? And don't say it like that. It's three syllables, not ten.

speaker: SALLY
text: What? He's nice to look at. You know, open-wheeled and all.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: What's wrong with fenders? I thought you like my fenders. MATER'S VOICE Well let me tell you something else there, Mr. San Francisco ---

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater? MATER'S VOICE McQueen could drive circles around you. FRANCESCO Driving in circles is all he can do, no? MATER'S VOICE No! I mean yes. I mean he could beat you anywhere, anytime, any track.

speaker: MATER
text: Ha ha! That shows what you know. Dump trucks is dumb.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Those are strong words from a car that is so fragile. FRANCESCO Fragile!? He calls Francesco fragile? Not so fast, McQueen!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: "Not so fast." What is that, your new motto?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Well, I would love to. The only thing is my crew's off for the season so ---

speaker: GUIDO
text: Pit stop.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: You know what? They just got back. Deal me in, baby. Ka-chow!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I know, I know. I just got back. But we won't be long and ---

speaker: SALLY
text: Oh, no, don't worry about me. I've got enough to do here. Mater's going to have a blast though. You're bringing Mater, right? You never bring him to any of your races.

speaker: SALLY
text: Just let him sit in the pits, give him a headset. C'mon, it'll be a thrill of a lifetime for him.

speaker: MATER
text: Your drinks, sir.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: I didn't taste it!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: How'd you like to come and see the world with me?

speaker: MATER
text: You mean it?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: You got me into this thing. You're coming along. BEGIN MONTAGE:

speaker: LUIGI
text: Guido, look! Ferraris and tires! Let's go!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Hey, look at this. Okay now Mater, remember: best behavior.

speaker: MATER
text: You got it, buddy. Hey, what's that?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater!

speaker: LEWIS HAMILTON
text: Hey, McQueen, over here!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Hey, Jeff. Lewis!

speaker: MATER
text: Hey! You done good! You got all the leaves!

speaker: JEFF GORVETTE
text: Check out that tow truck.

speaker: LEWIS HAMILTON
text: I wonder who that guy's with?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Will you guys excuse me just for one little second?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, listen. This isn't Radiator Springs.

speaker: MATER
text: You're just realizing that? Boy, that jet-lag really done a number on you.

speaker: MATER
text: Different than what?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Well, just... help me out here, buddy. I ---

speaker: MATER
text: You need help? Shoot, why didn't you just say so? That's what a tow truck does. Hey, looky there, it's Mr. San Francisco!

speaker: MATER
text: I'll introduce you.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, no.

speaker: MATER
text: Hey Mr. San Francisco, I'd like you to meet ---

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Lightning McQueen! Buona sera.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Nice to meet you, Francesco.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Yeah, nice to meet you too. You are very good-looking. Not as good as I thought, but you're good.

speaker: MATER
text: Excuse me. Can I get a picture with you?

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Anything for McQueen's friend.

speaker: MATER
text: Miss Sally is gonna flip when she sees this. She's Lightning McQueen's girlfriend.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Oooh.

speaker: MATER
text: She's a big fan of yours.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Hey, she has good taste.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater's prone to exaggeration. I wouldn't say she's a "big" fan.

speaker: MATER
text: You're right. She's a huge fan. She goes on and on about your open wheels here.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mentioning it once doesn't qualify as going "on and on."

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Francesco is familiar with this reaction to Francesco. Women respect a car that has nothing to hide.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yeah, uh...

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Let us have a toast.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Let's.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: I dedicate my win tomorrow... to Miss Sally.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh, sorry. I already dedicated MY win tomorrow to her. So if we both do it, it's really not so special. Besides, I don't have a drink.

speaker: MATER
text: I'll go get you one. You mind if I borrow a few bucks for one of them drinks?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: They're free, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: Free? Well, shoot, what am I doing here?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I should probably go keep an eye on him. See you at the race.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Yes, you will see Francesco. But not like this.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: You will see him like this, as he drives away from you.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: That's cute. So you had one of those made up for all the racers?

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: No.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Okay.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: He is so getting beat tomorrow.

speaker: VOICE
text: Ladies and gentlecars... Sir Miles Axlerod!

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: It is my absolute honor to introduce to you the competitors in the first-ever World Grand Prix. From Brazil. Number eight...

speaker: HOLLEY
text: A Volkswagen Karmann Ghia has no radiator.

speaker: FINN
text: That's because it's air-cooled.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: I'm Agent Shiftwell, Holley Shiftwell from the Tokyo Station. I have a message from London.

speaker: FINN
text: Not here. You must try the canapes on the mezzanine!

speaker: FINN
text: So the lab boys analyzed the photo I sent? What did they learn about the camera?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: It appears to be a standard television camera. They said if you could get closer photos next time, that would be great.

speaker: FINN
text: This was London's message?

speaker: FINN
text: How did we miss that?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: They'd been scrambling everyone's satellites. The Americans actually discovered it just before you did. They placed an agent on that platform, under deep cover. He was able to get a photo of the car who's running the entire operation.

speaker: FINN
text: Who is it? Has anyone seen the photo yet?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: No, not yet. The American is here tonight to pass it to you. He'll signal you when he's ready.

speaker: FINN
text: GOOD ---

speaker: FINN
text: Oh no.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: What is it?

speaker: FINN
text: Change of plan. You're meeting the American.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: What, me?

speaker: FINN
text: Those thugs down there were on the oil platform. If they see me, the whole mission is compromised.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: No, no. I'm technical, you see. I'm in Diagnostics. I'm not a field agent.

speaker: FINN
text: You are now.

speaker: MATER
text: I'll take one of them.

speaker: MATER
text: Never know which one McQueen'll have a hankering for.

speaker: MATER
text: Hey, what you got here that's free? How about that pistachio ice cream?

speaker: SUSHI CHEF
text: No, no. Wasabi.

speaker: MATER
text: Oh, same ol', same ol'. What's up with you? That looks delicious.

speaker: MATER
text: Uh, a little more, please. It is free, right? Keep it coming. A little more. Come on, let's go, it's free! You're getting there... Scoop scoop!

speaker: MATER
text: There you go. Now THAT's a scoop of ice cream.

speaker: SUSHI CHEF
text: My condolences.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: ... and now, our last competitor --- Number 95, Lightning McQueen!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Thank you so much for having us, Sir Axlerod. I really look forward to racing. This is a great opportunity.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: Oh, the pleasure is all ours, Lightning. You and your team bring excellence and professionalism to this competition.

speaker: MATER
text: Somebody get me water!

speaker: MATER
text: Sweet relief...

speaker: MATER
text: Whatever you do, do not eat the free pistachio ice cream. It has turned!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Sir Axlerod, I can explain. This is Mater.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: I know him. This is the bloke that called into the television show. You're the one I have to thank.

speaker: MATER
text: No, thank you. This trip's been amazing.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: He's a little excited, isn't he?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater!

speaker: MATER
text: But wait, I... oh, shoot.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, you have to get a hold of yourself. You're making a scene.

speaker: MATER
text: But I never leak oil. Never.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Go take care of yourself right now.

speaker: MATER
text: Coming through! Excuse me, leakin' oil. Where's the bathroom? Thank you. I gotta go!

speaker: MATER
text: What the...

speaker: MATER
text: Sorry ladies!

speaker: MATER
text: I never leak I never leak I never leak...

speaker: MATER
text: Wowee...

speaker: MATER
text: What in the---

speaker: MATER
text: Hey, that tickles.

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: Okay, McMissile. I'm here. It's time for the drop.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Oh, you've got to be joking.

speaker: FINN
text: What's the problem, Shiftwell?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: He's in the loo.

speaker: FINN
text: So go in!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: I can't just go into the men's loo.

speaker: FINN
text: Time is of the essence, Shiftwell.

speaker: MATER
text: Whatever you do, I would not go in there.

speaker: MATER
text: A Gremlin and a Pacer!

speaker: MATER
text: No offense to your makes and models, but you guys break down harder than my cousin Betsy after she got left at the ---

speaker: MATER
text: --- altar!

speaker: MATER
text: Are you okay?

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: I'm fine.

speaker: GREM
text: Hey. Tow truck.

speaker: GREM
text: We'd like to get to our private business here, if you don't mind.

speaker: MATER
text: Oh, yeah. Don't let me get in the way of your "private business." Oh! A little advice: When you hear her giggle and see that waterfall, you best press that green button.

speaker: GREM
text: Thank you.

speaker: MATER
text: It's to adjust the temperature.

speaker: ACER
text: Got it.

speaker: MATER
text: Remember it's in Celsius, not Fahrenheit. GREM AND ACER Get outta here!

speaker: MATER
text: Alright then.

speaker: MATER
text: Excuse me, ma'am.

speaker: MATER
text: Dadgum pistachio ice cream. HOLLEY This cannot be him. FINN Is he American?

speaker: MATER
text: Look out, ladies. Mater's fittin' to get funky! HOLLEY Extremely. FINN Then it's him.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Hello.

speaker: MATER
text: Well, hello.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: A Volkswagen Karmann Ghia has no radiator.

speaker: MATER
text: Well of course it doesn't. That's `cause it's air-cooled!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Perfect. I'm from the Tokyo Station OF THE---

speaker: MATER
text: Course, Karmann Ghia's weren't the only ones. Besides the Beetles you had your Type-3 Squarebacks, with the pancake motors...

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Yeah. Okay, I get it---

speaker: MATER
text: ... And before both of them, there's the Type-2 buses - my buddy Fillmore's one of them.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Listen! We should find somewhere more private.

speaker: MATER
text: Uh, gee. Don't you think that's a little, uh ---

speaker: HOLLEY
text: You're right. Impossible to know which areas here are compromised. So, when can I see you again?

speaker: MATER
text: Well, let's see. Tomorrow I'll be out there at the races.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Got it. We'll rendezvous then.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: There you are. Where have you been?

speaker: MATER
text: What's a rendezvous?

speaker: LUIGI
text: It's like a date.

speaker: MATER
text: A date?!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, what's going on?

speaker: MATER
text: Well, what's going on is I've got me a date tomorrow.

speaker: LUIGI
text: Guido don't believe you.

speaker: MATER
text: Well, believe it. My new girlfriend just said so. Hey, there she is.

speaker: MATER
text: Hey! Hey lady!

speaker: MATER
text: See ya tomorrow!

speaker: LUIGI
text: Guido still don't believe you.

speaker: GREM
text: --- you tricked us real good.

speaker: ACER
text: And we don't like being tricked.

speaker: ACER
text: Hey, what's so funny?

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: Well, you know, I was just wearing a disguise. You guys are stuck looking like that.

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: Allinol? Thanks, fellas. I hear this stuff is good for you. PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP So you think.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Allinol by itself is good for you.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: But after microscopic examination, I have found that it has one small weakness. When hit with an electromagnetic pulse, it becomes extremely dangerous.

speaker: GREM
text: SMILE ---

speaker: GREM
text: --- for the camera.

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: Is that all you want? I got a whole act.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: You were very interested in this camera on the oil platform. Now you will witness what it really does.

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: Whatever you say, Professor.

speaker: ACER
text: You talked up a lot of cars last night. Which one's your associate?

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: Your mother. Oh no, I'm sorry. It was your sister. You know, I can't tell them apart these days.

speaker: GREM
text: Could I start it now, Professor?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Fifty percent power. This camera is actually an electromagnetic pulse emitter.

speaker: ACER
text: What about her? Did you give it to her?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: The Allinol is now heating to a boil, dramatically expanding, causing the engine block to crack under the stress, forcing oil into the combustion chamber.

speaker: ACER
text: How about him? You talk to him?

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: What do I care? I can replace an engine block.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: You may be able to, but after full impact of the pulse, unfortunately, there will be nothing to replace.

speaker: ACER
text: How about him? Does he have it?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: That's him. He's the one.

speaker: GREM
text: Roger that, Professor Z.

speaker: ROD REDLINE
text: No!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: The project is still on schedule. You will find this second agent ---

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: --- and kill him.

speaker: BRENT MUSTANGBURGER
text: I'm Brent Mustangburger, here with racing legends Darrell Cartrip and David Hobbscap. There's never been a competition like this before.

speaker: DAVID HOBBSCAP
text: Really, Darrell, I think you need to clean your windshield. You're clearly not seeing this for what it is: Francesco's race to lose.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Speed. I am speed.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Really? You are "speed"? Then Francesco is triple speed. Francesco. Is. Triple speed. Francesco likes this, McQueen. It's really getting him into the zone!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: He is so getting beat today.

speaker: SARGE
text: His suspension stats look good.

speaker: LUIGI
text: Tire pressure is excellent.

speaker: FILLMORE
text: He's got plenty of fuel.

speaker: MATER
text: And he's awesome!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Why is he in the pits? He's so exposed.

speaker: FINN
text: It's his cover. One of the best I've seen, too. Look at the detail on that rust. It must have cost him a fortune.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: But why hasn't he contacted us yet?

speaker: FINN
text: There's probably heat on him. Be patient.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Right, of course. He'll signal us when he can.

speaker: FINN
text: And then we find out who's behind all this.

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen! It's time to make your move. Get on the outside and show 'em what Doc done taught you. MCQUEEN Ten four, Mater.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Nice call, Mater. Keep it up!

speaker: GREM
text: Roger that.

speaker: GREM
text: You gotta be kidding me.

speaker: ACER
text: What is it?

speaker: GREM
text: It's that tow truck from the bathroom.

speaker: ACER
text: The one from the bathroom?

speaker: GREM
text: Yeah, the one the American Agent passed the device to.

speaker: ACER
text: What about him?

speaker: GREM
text: What about him? He's in the pits!

speaker: ACER

text: I made a mistake. But I can assure you, it won't happen again.

text: Look, guys. We know what the problem is and we've taken care of it.

text: Lightning McQueen loses in the last lap to Francesco Bernoulli in the first race of the World Grand Prix and three, count em, three cars flamed out leading some to suggest that their fuel, Allinol, might be to blame.

text: Allinol is safe! Alternative fuel is safe! There is no way my fuel caused these cars to flame out!

text: Well the jury may still be out on whether Allinol caused these accidents, but one thing's for sure: Lightning McQueen blew this race.

text: Team McQueen can't be happy right now.

text: Come with me please, sir.

text: But I'm gonna miss my plane.

text: Right this way.

text: Doggone it. This is about my hook, isn't it? I know I should've checked it, but I can't really,

text: This first one I can reach into a car's hood, pull out his battery, and show it to him before he stalls. I call it, "What I accidentally did to my friend Luigi once."

text: Look, I probably ought to go. I'm about to miss my flight.

text: Don't worry.

text: I didn't really want him to leave.

text: Oh yes, sorry. It's Shiftwell. Holley Shiftwell.

text: It's Shiftwell. Holley ---

text: Well, that's one of the worst engines ever made. It's an old aluminum V8 with a Lucas electrical system and Whitworth bolts. Shoot, them Whitworth bolts is a pain, tell you what. Them ain't metric, they ain't inches...

text: You're pretty.

text: Just pay attention.

text: Right. And Miss Shiftwell's is designing iPhone apps.

text: You look a little light on weapons.

text: The big news continues to be Allinol. Sir Miles Axlerod spoke to the press earlier today to answer questions about its safety.

text: An independent panel of scientists has determined that Allinol is completely safe. Okay? Safe! There it is.

text: Mio nonno, my grandfather, has broken down. If one of you would help I would be so thankful.

text: Signore Tow Truck, per favore?

text: I, uh---

text: Come on, there's no time. Go!

text: He's in.

text: Wow, this place looks like it's made out of gold.

text: Why is that? What do you mean don't talk to you? So you want me to stop talking to you. Right now?

text: Hey, Victor! J. CURBY GREMLIN There you are.

speaker: VICTOR HUGO
text: Zundapp, when is he coming?

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: He's already here.

speaker: VOICE
text: Welcome, everyone.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: I wish I could be with you on this very special day but... my clutch assembly broke. You know how it is.

speaker: TUBBS PACER
text: Been there. J. CURBY GREMLIN Forget about it.

speaker: VLADIMIR TRUNKOV
text: We know how you feel.

speaker: FINN
text: Descramble that voice!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: I'm trying... It's too sophisticated!

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: We are here to celebrate. Today all your hard work pays off. The world turned their backs on cars like us. They stopped manufacturing us, stopped making our parts. The only thing they haven't stopped doing is laughing at us. They've called us terrible names...

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: Jalopy. Rustbucket.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: Heap. Clunker.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: Junker, beater, wreck.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: Rattletrap.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: Lemon. But their insults just give us strength. Because today, my friends...

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: ...that all ends.

speaker: FINN
text: What just happened?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: I'm working on it.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: They laughed at us. But now it's our turn to laugh back.

speaker: FINN
text: Holley?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: I'm detecting an extremely strong electromagnetic pulse.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Finn, it's the camera!

speaker: FINN
text: Where?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: On the tower.

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: And we, the owners of the world's largest untapped oil reserve, will become the most powerful cars in the world!

speaker: FINN
text: Get out of the way! Andate!

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: They will come to us and they will have no choice, `cause they will need us.

speaker: ACER
text: We figured you might stop by. ENGINE VOICE And they will finally respect us. So hold your hoods high. After today you will never again be ashamed of who you are!

speaker: FINN
text: No!

speaker: ENGINE VOICE
text: Long live Lemons!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Finn.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yeah!

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Dah! This is impossible!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: That's what I'm talking about. Kachow! Hey, where are all the other cars?

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: What is going on?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh no.

speaker: BRENT MUSTANGBURGER
text: Sir Axlerod! Is the final race in London still going to take place?

speaker: VLADIMIR TRUNKOV
text: Shh, quiet! BRENT MUSTANGBURGER And Allinol? Will you require all the racers to still run on Allinol?

speaker: VLADIMIR TRUNKOV
text: Here it comes.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: A toast! To the death of Allinol and alternative fuel forever!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Mater. Abort the mission. They've got Finn. Get out of there. Get out of there right now!

speaker: ALEXANDER HUGO
text: Isn't this a great party, Ivan?

speaker: MATER
text: Oh yeah, it's unbelievable.

speaker: ALEXANDER HUGO
text: You are not leaving, are you?

speaker: MATER
text: Uh, of course I ain't leavin'. MCQUEEN I'm just in shock like everybody...

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen?

speaker: LEMONHEADS
text: - What?! - Did he just say Allinol? After today? MCQUEEN My friend Fillmore says the fuel's safe. That's good enough for me. I didn't stand by a friend of mine recently. I'm not gonna make the same mistake twice.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Yes, sir. Of course.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Allinol must be finished for good. McQueen cannot win the last race. Lightning McQueen must be killed.

speaker: MATER
text: No!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: It's the American spy!

speaker: MATER
text: Dadgum.

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: "Gatling gun" request acknowledged.

speaker: MATER
text: Shoot. I didn't mean ---

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Request acknowledged.

speaker: VLADIMIR TRUNKOV
text: Get down!

speaker: MATER
text: Whoa!!

speaker: MATER
text: Wait wait! I didn't mean that kind of shoot!

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Correction acknowledged. Deploying chute.

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen!

speaker: ITALIAN MOTORBOAT
text: Aspetti!

speaker: MATER
text: Lemme through! Lemme through!

speaker: MATER
text: You gotta let me in! I gotta get through to warn McQueen!

speaker: MATER
text: No, listen! I was disguised as a tow truck to infiltrate this Lemonhead meeting and my weapons system misinterperated what I was SAYING --- ITALIAN SECURITY #2 I repeat. Lunatic at Gate Nove.

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen! McQueen!

speaker: PRESS LIAISON
text: Right this way, signore. MATER McQueen!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater?

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen! ITALIAN SECURITY #1 Back up, sir. Stop moving! Stop!

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen! ON MCQUEEN

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: That really sounded like Mater. Mater?

speaker: PRESS LIAISON
text: Signore...

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen, they're gonna kill you!!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater?!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Excuse me.

speaker: PRESS LIAISON
text: No, no, where are you going? Please, Mr. McQueen!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Scusi. Mater! Scusi...

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, I'm so glad to see you. I'm so sorr ---

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh, I'm sorry. I thought I heard--- IVAN THE TOW TRUCK Yes, but that was me. I said, "You killed out there today." You're the best.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: What? Oh. I mean, thanks.

speaker: PRESS LIAISON
text: Right this way, signore ---

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I really thought I heard my friend.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Wait, what?

speaker: PRESS LIAISON
text: Please, the world press is waiting. You come with me, please.

speaker: MATER
text: Let me go!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: You actually care about that race car. A pity you didn't warn him in time.

speaker: MATER
text: Domo arigato!

speaker: MATER
text: You done good! You got all the leaves!

speaker: JEFF GORVETTE
text: Check out that tow truck.

speaker: LEWIS HAMILTON
text: I wonder who that guy's with?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Will you guys excuse me just for one little second?

speaker: MATER
text: Now that's a scoop of ice cream!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater?!

speaker: MATER
text: I never leak oil. Never.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, you have to get a hold of yourself. You're making a scene!

speaker: MATER
text: Wait a minute. I didn't screw you up, did I?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I lost the race because of you!

speaker: MATER
text: Maybe if I talked to somebody, or---

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I don't need your help. I don't want your help!

speaker: MATER
text: Bang a gong, get it on!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Listen, this isn't Radiator Springs. This is exactly why I don't bring you along to these things!

speaker: MATER
text: Holley! Finn! Where are we?

speaker: FINN
text: We're in London, Mater. Inside Big Bentley.

speaker: MATER
text: Woaaaah! ---

speaker: MATER
text: This... this is all my fault.

speaker: FINN
text: Don't be a fool, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: But I am, remember? You said so.

speaker: FINN
text: When did I... Oh. Mater, I was complimenting you on what a good spy you are.

speaker: MATER
text: I'm not a spy!

speaker: MATER
text: I've been trying to tell you that the whole time. I really am just a tow truck.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Finn, he's not joking.

speaker: FINN
text: I know.

speaker: MATER
text: You were right, Finn. I'm a fool. And what's happened to McQueen is `cause I'm such a big one. This is all my fault.

speaker: GREM
text: Good, you're up!

speaker: ACER
text: And just in time!

speaker: GREM
text: Professor Z wanted you to have a front row seat for the death of Lightning McQueen.

speaker: MATER
text: He's still alive?

speaker: ACER
text: Not for much longer.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I called to talk to Mater. It never occurred to me that he wouldn't be there.

speaker: RAMONE
text: Sheriff is talking to Scotland Yard right now.

speaker: FLO
text: And Sarge is in touch with his friends in the British military.

speaker: SALLY
text: You just need to focus on the race.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I know, but Sal, with everything going on I'm not sure I should---

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Sir Axlerod.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: I'm sorry to interrupt.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: No, no, it's all right.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: I just wanted to come down here and personally thank you. Because after Italy, I was finished. And then you gave me one last shot.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Listen, I ---

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: And I probably shouldn't be saying this at all but... I hope you win today. Show the world that they've been wrong about Allinol.

speaker: SALLY
text: Mater would want you to race.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: All right. For Mater.

speaker: GREM
text: Here he comes!

speaker: GREM
text: I don't know, Professor.

speaker: ACER
text: What did you do?

speaker: GREM
text: I didn't do nothin'. Shh! I'm talking to the Professor---

speaker: ACER
text: You broke it.

speaker: GREM
text: Quiet! I understand, sir. Yes.

speaker: ACER
text: What'd he say?

speaker: GREM
text: We go to the backup plan.

speaker: MATER
text: Backup plan??

speaker: GREM
text: We snuck a bomb in McQueen's pit!

speaker: ACER
text: The next time he makes a stop, instead of saying "ka-chow," he's gonna go "ka-boom"!

speaker: GREM
text: Don't feel bad, tow truck. You couldn't have saved him.

speaker: ACER
text: Oh, wait. You could have!

speaker: MATER
text: Dadgum lemons.

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Request acknowledged.

speaker: GREM
text: What, you didn't think we'd take your bullets?

speaker: ACER
text: That's right! You got nothin'.

speaker: GREM
text: Who's the lemon now, huh?

speaker: FINN
text: Nice try, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: Dadgum!

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: REQUEST ACK-

speaker: MATER
text: Dadgum! Dadgum! Dadgum!

speaker: MATER
text: DADGUMDADGUMDADGUMDADGUM ---

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Mater!

speaker: MATER
text: I gotta get you all out of there!

speaker: FINN
text: There's no time. McQueen needs your help, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: But I can't, I'm just a tow truck.

speaker: FINN
text: It's up to you. Go to the pits and get everyone out. You can do that.

speaker: MATER
text: What about you guys?

speaker: FINN
text: We'll be okay.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Go and get some more dents, Mater.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: So we'll be "okay"? Really?

speaker: FINN
text: He wouldn't have left if I'd told him the truth. Being killed by a clock. Gives a whole new meaning to "your time has come."

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Time. That's it!

speaker: FINN
text: What are you doing?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Trying to turn back time. If I can just reverse the polarity...

speaker: FINN
text: Good job! Quick thinking, Holley!

speaker: MATER
text: What's everybody on the wrong side of the road for?!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Oh no!

speaker: FINN
text: Drive!

speaker: FINN
text: Burn rubber!!

speaker: FINN
text: We've got to get to the course. Calculate the fastest way to ---

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Done.

speaker: FINN
text: Miss Shiftwell.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: They're standard issue now.

speaker: FINN
text: You kids get all the good hardware.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Oh no. That's Mater's.

speaker: FINN
text: I knew his escape was too easy.

speaker: LUIGI
text: Mater!

speaker: MATER
text: Everybody get out! Get out now! Y'all gotta get out the pits!

speaker: MATER
text: Hey, what are you guys doing here?

speaker: SALLY
text: We're here because of you, Mater.

speaker: FLO
text: Is everything okay?

speaker: MATER
text: No! Everything's not okay! There's a bomb in here! Y'all gotta get out! Now!

speaker: EVERYONE
text: - A bomb? - Huh? - Woah. FINN Mater! MATER Finn! You're okay!

speaker: FINN
text: Mater, listen to me. The bomb is on you.

speaker: FINN
text: They knew you'd try to help McQueen. When we were knocked out they planted it in your air filter.

speaker: MATER
text: Uh-oh.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater! There you are!

speaker: MATER
text: Stop right there!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh man, I've been so worried about you!

speaker: MATER
text: Don't come any closer!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Are you okay?

speaker: MATER
text: No, I'm not okay. Stay away from me!!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: No, wait. Wait!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, wait!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, wait!

speaker: MATER
text: Stay back! If you get close to me, you gonna get hurt real bad!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I know I made you feel that way before, but none of that matters because we're best friends!

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen, you don't get it. I'm the bomb!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yes, Mater! You are the bomb! That's what I'm trying to say here. You've always been the bomb! And you'll always be the bomb.

speaker: MATER
text: Stay away!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: No! Never!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Almost there...

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I'm not...letting you...

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: ...get away again!

speaker: MATER
text: Gotta keep away from McQueen.

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Request acknowledged.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Oh my gosh!

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: What is happening? It's a bad dream.

speaker: TUBBS PACER
text: Someone's gotta get McQueen.

speaker: VLADIMIR TRUNKOV
text: Get McQueen!!

speaker: FINN
text: Holley. I'll get Zundapp, you help Mater.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Got it!

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: What is happening?!

speaker: COMBAT SHIP
text: Hurry, Professor!

speaker: FINN
text: Do you really think I'm going to let you float away, Professor?

speaker: MATER
text: McQueen, let go!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Never!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Give it up, McMissile!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Mater, stop!

speaker: MATER
text: No way! You could get hurt!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Oh no.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Mater, we've got to get that bomb off you.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Bomb?

speaker: MATER
text: Yeah, they strapped it to me to kill you as a back-up plan.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Back-up plan? Mater, who put a bomb on you? PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP Ahhhhh!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: You. Why didn't my death ray kill you?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Death ray?

speaker: FINN
text: Turn off the bomb, Zundapp!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Are you all so dense? It's voice- activated. Everything is voice- activated these days.

speaker: MATER
text: Deactivate! Deactivate! BOMB'S COMPUTER VOICE Voice denied.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Oops. Did I forget to mention that it can only be disarmed by the one who activated it?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Say it!

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: Deactivate. BOMB'S COMPUTER VOICE Voice denied.

speaker: PROFESSOR ZUNDAPP
text: I am not the one who activated it. Would anyone else like to try?

speaker: FINN
text: You read my mind.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: He was getting on my nerves.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: What do we do? VICTOR HUGO It's very simple.

speaker: VICTOR HUGO
text: You blow up.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I'm gonna go out on a limb here. These are the guys that want me dead, correct?

speaker: VLADIMIR TRUNKOV
text: It's nothing personal.

speaker: MATER
text: Fellers, listen.

speaker: MATER
text: I know what you're going through. Everybody's been laughing at me my whole life too ---

speaker: MATER
text: --- but becoming powerful and rich beyond your wildest dreams ain't gonna make you feel better. J. CURBY GREMLIN Yeah, but it's worth a shot.

speaker: GUIDO
text: Pit stop.

speaker: SHERIFF
text: Not today, boys!

speaker: TUBBS PACER
text: Retreat!

speaker: SARGE
text: Thanks for the help, Corporal.

speaker: BRITISH CORPORAL
text: Anything for one of pop's mates.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: What's he saying?! What's wrong!?

speaker: LUIGI
text: None of his wrenches fit the bolts!

speaker: MATER
text: I get it. I get it! I know what needs to be done.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Then do it!

speaker: MATER
text: What? No, I can't do it. Look, nobody takes me seriously. I know that now. This ain't Radiator Springs.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yes it is.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: You're yourself in Radiator Springs. Be yourself here. And if people aren't taking you seriously, then they need to change. Not you. I know that, because I was wrong before. Now you can do this. You're the bomb.

speaker: MATER
text: Thanks, buddy.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: No no no, you're the actual bomb. Now let's go!

speaker: MATER
text: Oh, right! Hang on!

speaker: FINN
text: Where's he going?

speaker: MATER
text: Computer!

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Yes, Agent Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: I need that thing you done before to get me away from McQueen!

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Request acknowledged.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater...

speaker: MATER
text: Now I need you to do the chute, the second kind not the first!

speaker: MATER'S COMPUTER
text: Deploying chute.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Who's winning the race?

speaker: QUEEN'S GUARD
text: Back up! Back away!

speaker: QUEEN
text: It's Lightning McQueen!

speaker: QUEEN'S GUARDS
text: Get back!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: No, no, it's okay! Tell them, Mater. Explain.

speaker: MATER
text: Okay! Somebody's been sabotaging the racers and hurting the cars and I know who. Oh wait... Your Majesty.

speaker: QUEEN'S GUARDS
text: - Bomb! - It's a bomb! - Everybody down! - Look out! FINN Hold your fire! He can't disarm it!

speaker: FINN
text: Mater, I don't know what you're doing but stand down now!

speaker: MATER
text: This ain't nothing at all like Radiator Springs.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, just cut to the chase!

speaker: MATER
text: Okay.

speaker: MATER
text: It's him.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: What? Me? You've got to be crazy.

speaker: MATER
text: I figured it out when I realized you all attached this ticking time bomb with Whitworth bolts. The same bolts that hold together that old British engine from the photograph. Holley! Show that picture.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: O-kay...

speaker: MATER
text: And then I remembered what they say about old British engines - "If there ain't no oil under `em, there ain't no oil in `em."

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: What is he talking about?

speaker: MATER
text: It was you leaking oil at the party in Japan. You just blamed it on me.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: Electric cars don't use oil, you twit.

speaker: MATER
text: Then you're faking it. You didn't convert to no electric. We pop that hood we gonna see that engine from that picture right there.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: This lorry's crazy. He's going to kill us all!

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: Stay away!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: But Sir Axlerod created the race, Mater. Why would he want to hurt anyone?

speaker: MATER
text: To make Allinol look bad so everybody'd go back to using oil. I mean, he said it himself with that disguised voice.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: "Dee-sguised voice?" What are you talking about? You're nuts, you are!

speaker: PRINCE WHEELIAM
text: This is going nowhere fast. We really should go, Grandmother.

speaker: QUEEN
text: One moment. I'd like to see where this is going.

speaker: FINN
text: Mater, he created Allinol.

speaker: MATER
text: Yeah, but what if he found that huge oil field just as the world was trying to find something else?

speaker: MATER
text: What if he came up with Allinol just to make alternative fuel look bad?

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: "What if?" You're basing this on a "What if"?!

speaker: GUARD
text: Okay, that's it.

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: Wait! Somebody save me! The lorry's crazy!

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: Keep away, you idiot!

speaker: FINN
text: Mater!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Mater!

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: Someone do something!

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: You're insane, you are! Deactivate!!

speaker: FINN
text: The engine from the photo.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: It's a perfect match!

speaker: MILES AXLEROD
text: How did the tow truck figure it out?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: It's official. You're coming to all my races from now on.

speaker: MATER
text: Now you're talking!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater, let's go. You're on.

speaker: LORD STEWARD
text: Your Majesty. May I present for the investiture of honorary Knighthood of the British Realm. Tow Mater of Radiator Springs.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Go get `em, buddy.

speaker: QUEEN
text: I hereby dub thee "Sir Tow Mater."

speaker: MATER
text: "Sir?" Shoot, you can just call me Mater, Your Majesty. I don't wanna hear none of this "Sir" business. By the way, have y'all met each other? Queen? McQueen. McQueen, Queen. McQueen? McMissile.

speaker: MATER
text: McMissile, McQueen. Queen? McMissile.

speaker: MATER
text: So there I was: rocket jets going full blast, McQueen hanging on for dear life when suddenly them two nasty lemons come out of nowhere, guns drawed. We was goners. But then out of nowhere, this beautiful spy car swoops in from the sky to save us!

speaker: MINNY
text: That's a very entertaining story, young man.

speaker: VAN
text: Oh, Minny, please. Come on, none of this happened. Rocket jets? Flying spy cars?

speaker: HOLLEY
text: No, you're quite right. It does sound a bit far-fetched.

speaker: MATER
text: Holley! Finn!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Hello, Mater. It's so nice to see you again.

speaker: MATER
text: What're you doing here?

speaker: FINN
text: Our satellites picked up an urgent communique.

speaker: LUIGI
text: So you got my e-mail.

speaker: MATER
text: Oh, man. Y'all is gonna have a great time. Everybody! This here's Finn McMissile. He's a secret agent. Don't tell nobody. And this is Holley Shiftwell. She's ---

speaker: HOLLEY
text: I'm Mater's girlfriend. It's so nice to meet you all.

speaker: LUIGI
text: Guido believe you now.

speaker: FLO
text: Whoa, honey. You got a nasty dent there.

speaker: VAN
text: Was that from when you swooped in and saved them in London?

speaker: MINNY
text: Van!

speaker: VAN
text: What? I'm just asking.

speaker: FLO
text: Don't you worry, sweet pea. My baby Ramone can get that fixed up for you in no time.

speaker: RAMONE
text: Yeah, sure thing. No problemo. Just let me go get my tools.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Oh no no. I'm keeping that dent. It's way too valuable.

speaker: LIZZIE
text: A "valuable" dent? Oh, she's as crazy as Mater.

speaker: MACK
text: Those two are perfect for each other.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: You know, there's one thing I still don't get. The bad guys hit me with the beam from the camera, right? So why didn't I, you know...

speaker: MATER
text: Explode in a fiery inferno?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yeah.

speaker: FINN
text: We couldn't figure that one out either.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Our investigation proved that Allinol was actually gasoline. And Miles Axlerod engineered it so that when it got hit by the beam it would explode.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Wait a second. Fillmore, you said my fuel was safe.

speaker: FILLMORE
text: If you're implying that I switched out that rotgut excuse for alternative fuel with my all- natural, sustainable, organic biofuel just because I never trusted Axlerod, you're dead wrong, man. It was him.

speaker: SARGE
text: Once Big Oil, always Big Oil. Man.

speaker: FILLMORE
text: Tree hugger.

speaker: SHERIFF
text: The Radiator Springs Grand Prix is about to begin! All spectators clear the starting line!

speaker: LEWIS HAMILTON
text: Man, I can't wait to get rockin'. This is gonna be wicked.

speaker: JEFF GORVETTE
text: Yeah, we should do this every year.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I just figured, we never found out who the world's fastest car is. Plus: no press, no trophy. Just racing - the way I like it.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Francesco likes it like this too.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Francesco. I'd like you to meet ---

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Signorina Sally. It is official: Lightning McQueen is the luckiest car in the world.

speaker: SALLY
text: Why, thank you ---

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Which he will have to be to have a chance against Francesco today.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: See you at the finish line, Mc---

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: What is that?

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: It's just something I had made up for the occasion.

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Is good, McQueen. Very funny. It was funnier when I did it, but it's very funny. What are you going to do next? Are you going to take off your fenders? Try it. You'll like it.

speaker: SALLY
text: So he's not so good-looking.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Yeah. Nice try.

speaker: SALLY
text: I'm serious.

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: That's why I love you, Sally. Wish me luck.

speaker: SALLY
text: You don't need it!

speaker: FLO
text: Mmm-mmm. That Francesco is fine- looking.

speaker: SALLY
text: And those open wheels.

speaker: FLO
text: I'm gonna have to go get myself some coolant.

speaker: MATER
text: Go McQueen!! Whoo-hoo!!!

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Finn, time to go. Siddeley's gassed, geared and ready to fly.

speaker: MATER
text: You're leaving already?

speaker: FINN
text: We've got another mission, Mater. Just stopped by here to "pick something up."

speaker: MATER
text: Something tells me you're not talking about souvenir bumper stickers.

speaker: FINN
text: Her Majesty asked for you personally, Mater.

speaker: MATER
text: But I told you all before. I'm not a spy.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: We know.

speaker: FINN
text: Spy or not, you're still the smartest, most honest chap we've ever met.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: Don't forget massively charming.

speaker: MATER
text: Well, thanks. But as much fun as it was hanging with y'all, this...

speaker: MATER
text: This is home.

speaker: HOLLEY
text: That's alright, we understand. But I'll be back. You still owe me that first date.

speaker: FINN
text: If there's ever anything I can do for you, just let me know.

speaker: MATER
text: Well, I sure appreciate that, thank you. Actually... there is one thing.

speaker: MATER
text: Whoo-hoo!!!

speaker: OTIS
text: Whoa!!!

speaker: FRANCESCO
text: Impossible!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: Mater!?

speaker: MATER
text: Check it out. They let me keep the rockets!

speaker: MCQUEEN
text: I'll see you at the finish line, buddy!

speaker: MATER
text: Not if I see you first!
